sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ المُوسِيقَى العَرَبِيَّةُ تَارِيخَ الشُّعُوبِ وَمَشَاعِرَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika odražava historiju naroda i njihova osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arab music reflects the history of peoples and their feelings.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدَمُ العَازِفُونَ آلَاتٍ قَدِيمَةً مِثْلَ العُودِ وَالقَانُونِ.
sentences.translation: Muzičari koriste stare instrumente poput uda i kanuna.
sentences.translationEn: Musicians use ancient instruments such as the oud and the qanun.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأَغَانِي تَتَحَدَّثُ عَنِ الحُبِّ وَالطَّبِيعَةِ وَالوَطَنِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesme su govorile o ljubavi, prirodi i domovini.
sentences.translationEn: The songs used to talk about love, nature, and the homeland.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِعُ النَّاسُ إِلَى الأَلْحَانِ الهَادِئَةِ فِي المَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi slušaju mirne melodije u večernjim satima.
sentences.translationEn: People listen to calm melodies in the evening.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ هَذِهِ الفُنُونُ جُزْءًا مِنَ الهُوِيَّةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove umjetnosti se smatraju dijelom kulturnog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: These arts are considered a part of cultural identity.
